title: Obstruction-Aware Planner PASS: class 4 (valid) — search proceeds, plan found
_fixture_purpose: Planner correctness certificate for a valid (non-forbidden) target. The planner is asked to find a plan reaching arithmetic class 4 (mod 9). The obstruction test passes: v_3(4)=0, OBSTRUCTION_ABSENT. The planner correctly does NOT prune: pruned_before_search=false. It expands 3 nodes and finds a valid 2-move plan. This fixture validates two things: (1) the planner correctly proceeds when the arithmetic side is clear, and (2) it would be wrong (PRUNE_DECISION_INCONSISTENT) to prune here. The plan witness is 'increase_gain → apply_lowpass' (seismic domain analog), reaching a state pair (b=2,e=0) with f(2,0)=4.

planner_behavior.plan_witness: increase_gain (quiet→p_wave) → apply_lowpass (p_wave→surface_wave); target state pair (b=2,e=0) has f(2,0)=4 ≡ 4 mod 9; arithmetic fingerprint matches target class; 2-move plan certified

validation_checks.details: pruned_before_search=false; planner correctly did not prune

validation_checks.description: valid target: plan_found is bool (not null — search ran)
